verif_result.fix_hint: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=1 across 8000 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.verilator_stderr: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=1 across 8000 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.classifier_reason: Simulation completed successfully with all 8 vectors received. Only 2/8000 outputs mismatched, max_error=1, signed_error_sum=0 (one +1, one -1), indicating a rounding tie-break in the INT8 quantized accumulation rather than a structural logic error. Latency is 1324 vs expected 1323 (off by one cycle). Both issues are fixable: adjust the pipeline latency constant by +1 and tighten the rounding mode (e.g., round-half-to-even vs truncate) in the accumulator output stage.
